description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design, enclosed by a tall, angular perimeter wall. The exterior is predominantly white with subtle blue accents, and features a mix of rectangular windows in varying sizes, some grouped in horizontal bands. The house sits on a triangular lot, with paved walkways and a small landscaped area with shrubs near one corner. The structure includes multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a rooftop area with skylights or glass panels. The main facade is characterized by clean lines, large window sections, and a recessed entryway. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on privacy and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with a flat roof, geometric lines, and a tall perimeter wall, featuring large windows and minimal blue accents.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main facade with large windows, blue accents, and the main entryway set within a tall, triangular perimeter wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with fewer windows, the perimeter fence, and a small landscaped area with shrubs.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the building's length, multiple balconies, and the paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the rear and side of the house, with visible terraces and the enclosed yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal bands and scattered rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway with minimal steps, no porch, and a clean, unornamented design integrated into the perimeter wall
